title: Vanilla Enhancer
description: Selection of 100+ mods to make Minecraft a little bit better
body:
# Vanilla Enhancer

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/601ca0f52f1eb7a8e0e07e52b186ed9afa5d236c.png)

## 📋 About
If you want to play solo or with friends on a modpack that doesn't change the Vanilla feeling of the game, you're in the right place!  
The modpack has a lot of performance improvements even with shaders, with mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris).  
You also have a ton of Quality of Life mods, such as [Comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts), [HerdsPanic](https://modrinth.com/mod/herdspanic), [Diagonal Fences](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-fences) and much more!  
Some texture packs and shaders have been included to enhance the visual of the game like [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) and [Faithful-32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) but you can add as many as you want.  
The terrain looks like the vanilla one in no way!  
The 3 dimensions are completly modified.  
Optifine is nearly completly reimplemented with mods from [this table](https://github.com/skywardmc/additive/wiki/Give-up-OptiFine), which are mods used in the [Additive modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive).  


## 🔧 Installation
You can either download the .mrpack through your browser and import it as a file in the Modrinth application *(or the launcher of your choice if it supports Modrinth modpacks)*, or download directly from the Modrinth application *(or again, another launcher if it supports Modrinth modpacks)* and have content updated without needing to download the entire modpack once again.  
By default, all server-side only mods, except for Terralith, are disabled, you can enable them back if you want to play in singleplayer but still having the whole experience.
But if you have a server, you wont need to enable them back on your client, but make sure they are enabled on the server.


## 📦 Content
